message:
fix: remove incorrect Dolt backend skip in StaleClosedIssues (bd-bbr6)

The skip condition (lines 39-43) claimed StaleClosedIssues used
"SQLite-specific storage", but the actual code path uses
dolt.NewFromConfig() — the Dolt store factory. This prevented the
stale issue cleanup from running on the primary (Dolt) backend.
PatrolPollution in the same file uses the identical pattern without
any skip, confirming the condition was erroneous.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
